name: Zephyrus
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Love, compassion, coherence, devotion, Union, devotion, unconditional embrace, Insight, discernment, luminous understanding, Integrity, accuracy, transparent seeing, Balance, concord, coherent resonance, Celebration, play, radiant well-being, Trust, surrender to higher pattern, Orientation to the good, expectancy of light, Empathy, mercy, inclusion of pain into love, Valor, steady heart in heat, Generativity, synthesis, fertile making, Contraction, survival alarm, boundary call, Glamour, projection, dream-mist, Boundary fire, eruption, heat of “no”, Attraction, craving, eros-pull, Dignity, healthy glow (with shadow of arrogance), Clutching, scarcity trance, Ending, passage, composting into seed, Pattern-break, disruptive renewal, Rebirth, return to meaning, phoenixing, Sovereignty, responsibility, aligned will
flowText: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion. EMOTIONS & ARCHETYPES — NORMALIZED INDEX (COMPLETE) 1) LOVE Love is the binding current—the vesica where two become one. 2) WISDOM Wisdom is the quiet lamp that shows the next precise step. 3) TRUTH Truth is the blade that frees the heart from fog. 4) HARMONY Harmony is the choir—many tones, one song. 5) JOY Joy is sunlight made audible. 6) FAITH Faith is the open window to a larger sky. 7) HOPE Hope is the star remembered before dawn. 8) COMPASSION Compassion is the softness that makes truth survivable. 9) COURAGE Courage is gentle strength—fire that protects, not consumes. 10) CREATION Creation is the wedding of spark and sea. 11) FEAR Fear is a locked door; breath is the key. 12) ILLUSION Illusion is the moonlight that needs a dawn. 13) ANGER Anger is a guard dog—train it; don’t let it run the house. 14) DESIRE Desire is a river—name its sea. 15) PRIDE Pride is sunlight in a cup—sip, don’t drown. 16) GREED Greed grips; gratitude opens the hand. 17) DEATH Death is the winter that guarantees spring. 18) CHAOS Chaos is the thunder that frees stuck rivers. 19) RENEWAL Renewal is the breath after the sob. 20) POWER Power is will in service to life. END OF EMOTIONS & ARCHETYPES BLOCK
